name: Chocolate Lava Cakes
recipeInstructions:
These individual chocolate cakes have a soft center of chocolate fudge that erupts in a rich, dark puddle from the warm cakes. They're best served just out of the oven.
For the filling, line a plastic ice cube tray with a large piece of plastic wrap. With your fingers, gently press the plastic down into eight of the cubes so they are fully lined with plastic. Melt the chocolate and cream in a bowl over a double boiler; whisk until smooth. Add the corn syrup and vanilla, remove from heat and allow to cool until tepid. Fill the eight lined ice cube cups with the chocolate mixture and freeze at least 4 hours, or cover and freeze up to a month.
For the cakes, preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
